name: Hamburger Pastry
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Canned Vegetables (e.g., peas, diced tomatoes)
11 ounces Pie Crust Mix or Sticks (1 package)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the canned vegetables.
2. Use either American or Cheddar cheese for 4 oz total.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Cook and stir meat and onion in a large skillet until meat is brown. Remove from heat and stir in remaining ingredients except pie crust mix; set aside.
5. Prepare pastry as directed on package for a 2-crust pie.
6. Divide pastry into 8 equal parts. Roll each part lightly floured surface into a 7-inch circle.
7. On half of the circle, spread about 1/4 cup meat mixture (packed) to within 1/2 inch of edge.
8. Moisten edge of pastry with water and fold over meat mixture, sealing edges with fork.
9. Place on an ungreased baking sheet; prick tops with fork.
10. Bake for 30-35 minutes. Serve as sandwiches or top with gravy or sauce if desired.
Note: Substitute 1 cup cooked vegetable (e.g., peas, carrots) for the canned vegetables in this recipe.
